headline: How The easyJet (LSE:EZJ) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: easyJet’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from £6.02 to £5.78, while fresh price targets now cluster around £5.40 and £6.80. Analysts are split, with some keeping positive ratings and even issuing upgrades, and others downgrading the shares as they reassess how confidently easyJet can deliver on existing forecasts. Read on to see what is driving this debate and how you can keep track as the story develops. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our...
